---
title: "Intro"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
---

In this section, we introduce topological properties of $\mathbb{R}$ such as open and closed sets, compactness, connectedness, etc. This section focuses exclusively on the real line, although all of these properties exist for general topological spaces and discussed in [Topology].

- Open sets
- Closed sets
- Points
- Compactness
- Connected

- Measure
- Density
- Meager sets
- Baires category theorem
- Blumburg Theorem
-
